quoteFirst: Thus, when it is noon at Greenwich, it is
quoteLast: , or five hours before noon, at New York, because the angular distance westward round the earth's surface from Greenwich to New York is, in round numbers, 75°, which corresponds with five hours of time, there being 150 to every hour.
